title: BILL Stock Tickeron detected bullish Stock Pattern: Triangle Symmetrical Top BILL on August 27, 2025, netting in a 0.32% gain over 1 month
author: tickeron_community
selftext: On July 23, 2025, A.I.dvisor detected a Triangle Symmetrical Top Pattern (Bullish) for [BILL Holdings](https://tickeron.com/ticker/BILL/) ([BILL](https://tickeron.com/ticker/BILL/), $46.54). On August 27, 2025, A.I.dvisor confirmed the Bullish pattern, setting a target price of $52.01. 8 days later, on September 04, 2025, [BILL](https://tickeron.com/ticker/BILL/) reached the target price resulting in a +0.32% for traders who took a long position in the stock.
